items.raw_excerpt: One of Vermont's most historic cheesemakers got a chance to continue its legacy by teaming up with another to bring its cheese into the future.
items.summary_en: A historic Vermont cheesemaker is continuing its legacy through a partnership with another cheesemaker. The collaboration aims to help bring Grafton Village Cheese into the future while preserving its local identity.
items.title_en: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese
items.title_original: Made in Vermont: Grafton Village Cheese - WCAX

items.raw_excerpt: The Village Coffee & Music in Utrecht.
items.summary_en: The Village Coffee & Music is a coffee spot in Utrecht located in the old Wolvenplein prison. The Sprudge feature highlights its unusual mix of specialty coffee, music, and a heavy metal atmosphere in a historic local setting.
items.title_en: Heavy Metal Coffee in an Old Dutch Prison at The Village Wolvenplein
items.title_original: Heavy Metal Coffee In An Old Dutch Prison At The Village Wolvenplein - Sprudge

items.title_en: Full List of Reserve Officer Promotions Published

items.raw_excerpt: The Talking France podcast is back, looking at Emmanuel Macron's 'diplomatic swansong', debating whether Lyon is really the gastronomic capital of France, giving a tips for off-the-beaten track places to visit this summer and tackling the biggest question of all - does France really have half the world's roundabouts?
items.summary_en: The Talking France podcast returns with a mix of national politics, travel tips, and quirky everyday questions about France. Topics include Emmanuel Macron's diplomatic legacy, Lyon's reputation as France's gastronomic capital, lesser-known summer destinations, and France's love of roundabouts.
items.title_en: Podcast: Macron's swansong, why France is mad for roundabouts and how Lyon became the home of gastronomy
items.title_original: PODCAST 🎧: Macron’s swansong, why France is mad for roundabouts and how Lyon became the home of gastronomy

items.raw_excerpt: Cyprus is preparing to host Europe with diplomatic seriousness and a salad that has clearly been to culinary finishing school.
items.summary_en: The article appears to playfully frame Cyprus' European hosting preparations through the image of a Cyprus village salad styled for Brussels. It reads as a light food-and-culture item rather than major political news.
items.title_en: A Cyprus Village Salad à la Brussels
items.title_original: A Cyprus village salad à la Brussels (no travel required) - Kathimerini.com.cy

items.raw_excerpt: El municipio busca combatir la despoblación con siete viviendas en un solar municipal para atraer residentes
items.summary_en: A tiny municipality in Castellón plans to build seven homes on municipal land to fight depopulation. The project aims to attract residents by linking housing with work opportunities and help secure the village's future.
items.title_en: Castellón village of 30 residents to build apartments to attract new inhabitants
items.title_original: Un pueblo de Castellón con solo 30 vecinos construirá apartamentos para atraer habitantes y salvar su futuro - El Periódico Mediterráneo

items.raw_excerpt: Fans of Maná, the most successful Latin American band of all time, are gearing up for a free outdoor concert in Guadalajara Wednesday night.
items.summary_en: Fans of Maná are preparing for a free outdoor concert in Guadalajara. The band plans to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforestation projects in Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta.
items.title_en: Maná to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforesting Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta
items.title_original: Maná to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforesting Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta

items.raw_excerpt: Everyday commerce is beginning to fray as financial institutions shift focus to digital services across rural Canada
items.summary_en: A small town in Ontario is worried about the local impact of losing its last remaining bank branch. The closure reflects a broader shift toward digital banking that is straining everyday commerce in rural Canada.
items.title_en: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes
items.title_original: A small Ontario town fears collapse as its last bank branch closes - The Globe and Mail

items.raw_excerpt: I Den Gamle By i Aarhus kan du oppleve Danmark slik det var da H.C. Andersen levde. Nå blir også 2014 en del av historien.
items.summary_en: Den Gamle By in Aarhus lets visitors experience Denmark as it was when H.C. Andersen lived. The museum is now also making 2014 part of its historical story.
items.title_en: Den Gamle By in Aarhus: A Visit to the Old Days
items.title_original: Den Gamle By i Aarhus: Et besøk i gamle dager - Stavanger Aftenblad

items.raw_excerpt: Temperatures dropped to -10.2 degrees Celsius in the Utrecht village of Cabauw overnight, marking the first severe frost of the season and the first time temperatures dropped below -10 degrees since January 2024, Weeronline reported. The icy cold weather will stick around for some time yet, with new snowfall expected tomorrow.
items.summary_en: Temperatures fell to -10.2 degrees Celsius overnight in Cabauw, a village in Utrecht, marking the first severe frost of the season. More icy weather and new snowfall were expected to continue the wintry spell.
items.title_en: Severe frost hits Utrecht village as more snow is expected
items.title_original: More snowfall, icy weather tomorrow; -10.2°C in Utrecht village overnight - NL Times

items.raw_excerpt: Confira os bloqueios na Avenida Victor Ferreira do Amaral para o transporte de vigas do Novo Inter 2, a partir de segunda-feira (15/6)
items.summary_en: Curitiba city officials announced traffic blocks and detours on Avenida Victor Ferreira do Amaral starting Monday, June 15. The restrictions are for transporting beams for the Novo Inter 2 project in the Capão da Imbuia and Bairro Alto areas.
items.title_en: Traffic blocks and detours planned in Curitiba for beam installation
items.title_original: Operação de lançamento de vigas terá bloqueios de trânsito e desvios no Capão da Imbuia e Bairro Alto - Prefeitura de Curitiba

items.raw_excerpt: Kozhikode (Kerala), Jun 13 (PTI) A stadium in the middle of a Kerala river with the entire Argentine squad standing on it! No, the South American team has not finally arrived in the state—but it is a float created by football-crazy fans in Pullavoor village here. Football mania has already gripped the state in the […]
items.summary_en: Fans in Pullavoor village near Kozhikode created a floating stadium display in a Kerala river, complete with cutouts of the Argentine football squad. The playful installation reflects the area's intense football fandom ahead of Argentina-related excitement in the state.
items.title_en: Kerala Football Fans Float an Argentina Stadium in a River
items.title_original: Argentina fans in Kerala village set up floating stadium with squad cutouts in river - ThePrint

items.summary_en: A new spot called Sitatte Sapporo is opening in the Sapporo Fukoku Seimei Koshiyama Building near the intersection of Sapporo Ekimae-dori and Kita 3-jo-dori. The venue features shops making their first appearance in Hokkaido and a series of limited menu items.

items.raw_excerpt: Karistaessaan pääkaupungin tomut jaloistaan suuntaavat monet helsinkiläiset mökille – Helsinkiin! Talvisaikaan Taivassalossa sijaitseva Helsinki on kuuden asukkaan uinuva kylä, mutta kesäisin sen väkimäärä moninkertaistuu.
items.summary_en: Many residents of Finland's capital head to their summer cottages in a place also called Helsinki. In winter, this Helsinki in Taivassalo is a sleepy village of six residents, but its population multiplies in summer.
items.title_en: Summer cottage-goers fill the tiny Helsinki in Taivassalo
items.title_original: Mökkihelsinkiläiset täyttävät kesällä Helsingin - Yle

items.raw_excerpt: Construction has started on northwest Tasmania’s new $60 million shopping centre, due for completion in mid-2027, which will feature a huge new Woolworths as its anchor tenant, along with a Chemist Warehouse. Called Stony Rise …
items.summary_en: Construction has started on a new $60 million shopping centre in northwest Tasmania. The Stony Rise development is expected to open in mid-2027, anchored by Woolworths and Chemist Warehouse.
items.title_en: Construction begins on new Stony Rise shopping centre in Tasmania
items.title_original: Construction starts on Tasmania's newest shopping centre, Woolworths and Chemist Warehouse to anchor - realcommercial.com.au

items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists have uncovered the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever found in the Netherlands, during excavations in the Waalfront district of Nijmegen. The dig, carried out by the archaeology firms RAAP and BAAC on a former industrial site, also turned up housing blocks, streets, luxury townhouses, a tower and tens of thousands of objects, Nijmegen council said. The baths stood in Ulpia Noviomagus, the Roman city on the site of present-day Nijmegen. The site is at least 4,900 square metres –.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists excavating the Waalfront district of Nijmegen have found the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever discovered in the Netherlands. The former industrial site also revealed streets, housing blocks, luxury townhouses, a tower, and tens of thousands of objects from Ulpia Noviomagus.
items.title_en: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands' largest Roman bathhouse
items.title_original: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands’ largest Roman bathhouse

items.raw_excerpt: A central Alberta town won't host its annual parade this year after organizers said a decision to disallow a pro-Alberta float led to a barrage of "online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages."
items.summary_en: A central Alberta town will not hold its annual parade this year after organizers disallowed a pro-Alberta float. Organizers said the decision led to overwhelming online criticism, personal attacks, harassment, and abusive messages.
items.title_en: Central Alberta town cancels annual parade after harassment over rejected float
items.title_original: Town cancels parade, citing 'overwhelming' harassment after pro-Alberta float disallowed

items.raw_excerpt: Supreme Court directs Odisha government to ensure social security and basic amenities for an octogenarian and her visually impaired son.
items.summary_en: India's Supreme Court directed the Odisha government to provide social security and basic amenities for an 80-year-old woman and her visually impaired son. The case centers on ensuring a dignified life for a vulnerable family in Odisha.
items.title_en: Supreme Court Seeks Dignified Life for Elderly Woman and Visually Impaired Son
items.title_original: Supreme Court steps in to ensure ‘dignified life’ for octogenarian, visually impaired son
